Admissions 2025/2026

Secure your child's future with Oxford Academic Complex. Places are limited.

Admissions

Join Our Community.

Admissions at Oxford Academic Complex are open year-round, with the main intake period beginning each September. Places are competitive — early registration is strongly encouraged to secure your child's spot.

Admission Requirements

To register your child at any OAC campus (Douala-Bepanda, Tombel, or Loum), please bring the following documents to the admissions office:

  • Previous academic report card — Original and one (1) photocopy
  • Birth certificate — Original and one (1) photocopy
  • Two (2) recent passport-size photographs
  • Photocopy of national identity card of parent or legal guardian
  • Medical certificate of fitness (for new students)

Flexible Payment:

Parents have the privilege to pay school fees at their convenience throughout the academic year. OAC understands the financial realities of families and does not turn students away for temporary payment delays.

Family Discount:

Fee reductions are available for families enrolling 4 or more children at OAC. Contact the bursar's office at any campus for details on eligible discounts.

Why Choose OAC

For over 17 years, families across the Littoral and South West regions have trusted OAC with their children's education. Here's why:

  • Purely Anglo-Saxon Education SystemEnglish-language instruction following the Cameroon GCE curriculum
  • GCE Examiners as TeachersFaculty who set and mark national examinations
  • Official MINESEC & GCE Center (No. 11972)Students sit exams at their own school
  • Conducive & Secure Learning EnvironmentFenced campuses with supervision from 7:30 AM to 4:00 PM
  • Most Flexible Payment Structure in the RegionPay fees at your convenience — no child sent home
  • Equal Opportunity for All StudentsGender equality and inclusive policies across all programs

Key dates, examination periods, and events for the current academic year. All dates are subject to official MINESEC directives.

Dates are indicative. Official exam timetables are published by the GCE Board and MINESEC.

Testimonials

Voices of Our Community.

Parents, alumni, and students share their OAC experience — from the classrooms of Tombel to the examination halls of Bepanda.

“When we moved to Douala, finding a school that truly understood the Anglo-Saxon system was our top priority. OAC Bepanda delivered beyond our expectations. My son sat for his GCE O-Levels right at the school, and the teachers — many of them GCE examiners — prepared him exceptionally well. He passed with 8 papers on the first attempt.”

Mrs. Grace Etonde Mbella

Parent — Douala Campus

2024
FAQ

Questions & Answers.

Everything you need to know about enrolling at Oxford Academic Complex — from programs and admission requirements to payment flexibility and campus locations.

OAC follows the purely Anglo-Saxon (English-language) system of education as prescribed by the Cameroon Ministry of Secondary Education (MINESEC). All instruction, examinations, and administration are conducted in English, following the official GCE Board syllabi for General, Technical, and Commercial education.

OAC.

Founded by seasoned educationists, Oxford Academic Complex is committed to providing elite Anglo-Saxon education in a nurturing environment since 2007.
